zh.Ashburnham, Sussex, England: 英國素可阿申波恩哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Beching於1538年出生在英國英格蘭肯特阿福德時，她的父親John Edward Beching18歲，母親Priscilla Gifford19歲。她和Edmund Masterson至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。她去世於1598年在英國肯特阿福德享年60歲。

zh-hans.Ashburnham, Sussex, England: 英国素可阿申波恩哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Beching于1538年出生在英国英格兰肯特阿福德时，她的父亲John Edward Beching18岁，母亲Priscilla Gifford19岁。她和Edmund Masterson至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。她去世于1598年在英国肯特阿福德享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beching
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): topographic name from either Old English bece, bæce ‘stream’ or Old English bēce ‘beech’, hence denoting a dweller by a stream or a beech tree.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Beching was born in 1538, in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Edward Beching, was 18 and her mother, Priscilla Gifford, was 19. She had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Edmund Masterson. She died in 1598, in Ashford, Kent, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Beching est née en 1538, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Edward Beching, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Priscilla Gifford, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Edmund Masterson. Elle est décédée en 1598, à Ashford, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Beching 1538 in Ashford, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Edward Beching 18 und ihre Mutter Priscilla Gifford 19. Sie hatte mit Edmund Masterson mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1598 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Ashford, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Beching è nata il nel 1538 nel Ashford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Edward Beching, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Priscilla Gifford, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Edmund Masterson. Morì nel 1598, nel Ashford, Kent, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Bechingが1538年にイギリスイギリスケントアシュフォードで生まれた時，父John Edward Bechingは18歳，母Priscilla Giffordは19歳であった。彼女はEdmund Mastersonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1598年にイギリスケントアシュフォードで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Beching(이)가 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Edward Beching(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Priscilla Gifford(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Edmund Masterson(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 영국 켄트 애스h퍼드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Beching nasceu em 1538, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Edward Beching, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Priscilla Gifford, tinha 19 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Edmund Masterson. Ela faleceu em 1598, em Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Beching родилась в 1538 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Edward Beching было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Priscilla Gifford, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Edmund Masterson. Она умерла в 1598 г. в местности ашфорд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Beching nació en 1538, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Edward Beching, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Priscilla Gifford, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Edmund Masterson. Murió en 1598, en Ashford, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
